title: Creator's Gift applies Atk Hit and dice bonuses while equipped

card.rawText: This card cannot be negated when played. Atk: +6. Hit: +6. Atk Dice Rolls: +2. Hit Dice Rolls: +2.

effect.value: Atk +6; Hit +6; Atk Dice Rolls +2; Hit Dice Rolls +2

plan.title: Creator's Gift applies Atk Hit and dice bonuses while equipped
plan.summary: Equip Creator's Gift to a modifier-zero primary creature, run a battle, and verify the printed Hit, Atk, and attack dice bonuses.

notes: Use test_primary_creature_mod_0 so Hit, Atk, and attack dice bonuses come only from Creator's Gift.

steps: Player 1 plays Creator's Gift and equips it to their primary creature.
Run a follow-up battle with the equipped creature attacking.
Inspect hit modifier, attack dice count, and damage dealt.

expectedAssertions.label: Attack damage includes +6 Atk and extra dice

manualVerification: Confirm the extra Hit Dice Rolls are also shown in battle UI.
riskNotes: This fixture verifies Hit, Atk, and attack dice with stable paths; hit dice count still needs a first-class effective stat assertion path.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Validate Creator's Gift equipped stat and dice suite.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
